title: Exact per-token piece bytes
description: Convert a token vector scoped to the pinned model into individual piece-byte arrays through the production token-to-piece binding, then compare each piece and their concatenation exactly without assuming valid UTF-8 at intermediate boundaries.

source.note: The token IDs are scoped to the exact stories15m-q4-0 vocabulary and were produced by the companion tokenize vector. The claim is per-token conversion through the public model API, not a composite bulk-detokenization helper.
